sections.paragraph:
Original: עיפה

Transliteration: ‛êyphâh

Phonetic: ay-faw'

BDB Definition:

Ephah = "gloomy"
  1. a son of Midian (noun proper masculine)
  2. a Judaite, son of Jahdai (noun proper masculine)
  3. a concubine of Caleb in the line of Judah (noun proper feminine)

Origin: the same as H5890

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
